# Xenovoya

A Chart & Depart expedition game about mapping hostile terrain, managing crew pressure, and escaping alive.

## Core Pages

- [Xenovoya](https://xenovoya.luckymachines.com): Play Xenovoya, a Chart & Depart expedition game about mapping hostile terrain, recovering value, and escaping before the route collapses.
- [Gameplay Simulator](https://xenovoya.luckymachines.com/simulator): Use the same engine as the game to run scenarios, compare outcomes, and tune Xenovoya without a separate rules clone.
- [Play Xenovoya](https://xenovoya.luckymachines.com/play): Start a seedable Chart & Depart run and see if the expedition can chart useful ground, recover value, and escape alive.
- [Weekly Challenge: Desperate Lift-Off](https://xenovoya.luckymachines.com/challenge): Can your crew escape with the artifact before the route collapses?
- [Expedition Scenarios](https://xenovoya.luckymachines.com/scenarios): Choose Xenovoya expeditions by pressure, difficulty, player count, and escape tension.

## Scenario Pages

- [Escape Pressure 4P](https://xenovoya.luckymachines.com/scenarios/escape-pressure-4p): Get the artifact holder out while the crew keeps each other moving.
- [Solo Artifact Hunt](https://xenovoya.luckymachines.com/scenarios/solo-artifact-hunt): Find one artifact and escape before fatigue turns the board flat.
- [Low Stat Recovery](https://xenovoya.luckymachines.com/scenarios/low-stat-recovery): Stabilize the crew, reveal a route, then leave with at least one recovery moment.

## Discovery Topics

- [Chart & Depart Board Game](https://xenovoya.luckymachines.com/topics/turn-based-board-game): Chart & Depart scenarios where every action changes pressure, route shape, and the decision to leave.
- [Survival Expedition](https://xenovoya.luckymachines.com/topics/survival-expedition): Expedition scenarios about morale, danger, fatigue, and extracting value before the board closes in.
- [Artifact Hunt](https://xenovoya.luckymachines.com/topics/artifact-hunt): Relic-hunting scenarios where digging creates payoff, risk, and memorable escape stories.
- [Co-Op Escape](https://xenovoya.luckymachines.com/topics/co-op-escape): Cooperative escape scenarios built around helping, routing, and keeping the artifact holder alive.
- [Same-Engine Simulator](https://xenovoya.luckymachines.com/topics/same-engine-simulator): Scenario tuning and outcome learning powered by the same contract engine as playable Xenovoya.
